name: Butterscotch Apple Crumb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine lemon juice and apples; toss until well coated.
3. Stir in sugar, flour, cinnamon, and salt; mix well.
4. Turn into 9-inch unbaked pie shell. Cover edges with aluminum foil.
5. Bake at 375 degrees for 20 minutes.
6. TOPPING: Melt butterscotch chips over hot (not boiling water), butter; stir until smooth.
Remove from heat, stir in flour and salt.
Blend until mixture forms large crumbs.
7. Remove foil from pie. Crumb mixture over top of hot apples.
8. Bake at 375 degrees for 25 minutes longer.
